scope.summary: Dispatch semantic-read fixtures now pass at current committed HEAD after the A1a fail-closed catalog proof change.
out_of_scope: Weakening the A1a fail-closed VPD/virtual-column catalog gate.
Restoring the old fail-open expectations or marking tests ignored.
Claiming hosted CI green for local HEAD; the latest GitHub CI evidence available during this close was still for older SHA 3e87e88.

entry_points.name: dispatch fixture lane
entry_points.trace: `cargo test -p oraclemcp --lib -- dispatch::tests::` exercises the stale semantic-read fixture surface directly, including audit_wiring, query/arrow, flashback/diff, query-cost, streaming, profile-switch, and semantic-search tests.

entry_points.name: clean committed HEAD dispatch semantic-read lane
entry_points.trace: `set -o pipefail; CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/target/8ul1t-fix cargo test -p oraclemcp --lib -- dispatch::tests:: 2>&1 | tee /tmp/8ul1t-dispatch-head.log` -> PASS: 303 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored; 62 filtered out; finished in 1.35s.

entry_points.name: original CI failure class confirmed on older hosted SHA
entry_points.trace: `gh run view 29914338034 --log-failed` showed the older hosted CI run for 3e87e88 failed with the same dispatch::tests UnprovenSideEffect / unresolved semantic read dependency class reported in the bead.

limitations: tree_clean is scoped to the dispatch fixture paths named above; the wider shared checkout still has other agents' dirty, unrelated files.

The latest hosted GitHub CI run inspected was for older SHA 3e87e88 and remains red. Local HEAD is 1fed082f and was 54 commits ahead of origin/main when this evidence was generated, so there was no hosted verdict for the proven HEAD.
This close proves the dispatch semantic-read lane that caused the bead. It does not claim workspace-wide CI green or repair unrelated CI failures from older hosted runs.
